name: axiom-determinism-and-replay
description: Architecture-level determinism and replay: seed governance, RNG isolation, snapshot strategy, divergence detection, and replay infrastructure design. Frames 'what happened' as a recoverable fact for RL substrates, multi-agent systems, and any simulation that must be re-run from inputs. v0.1.0 ships router + 6 foundational sheets covering the architectural spine; concurrency, GPU, floating-point, external-effects substitution, canonical state encoding, property-test discipline, cost analysis, plus 3 commands and 2 agents are scheduled for v0.2.0.
